ui.topbar_tag: Masu kera OEM/ODM a Duniya · Tun daga 1998
ui.hero_eyebrow: ✦ Amintaccen Mai Kera Tace Ruwa Tun daga 1998
ui.hero_title: Hanyoyin Tace Ruwa na Matakin Masana'antu
ui.hero_desc: Mun ƙware a kera PP, Carbon Block, GAC, T33, RO membranes, da na'urorin ba da ruwa. Muna da takardar shaidar NSF · ISO · CE · Halal. Abokan hulɗar OEM/ODM a ƙasashe 50+.
ui.stats_countries: Ƙasashen da Muke Yi Wa Aiki
ui.about_title: Sama da Shekaru 20 na Ƙwarewa a Tace Ruwa
ui.about_desc: Eco Express Water babban kamfani ne na kare muhalli wanda ya ƙware a fannin kayan tace ruwa da na'urorin tace ruwa. An kafa shi a shekarar 1998, kayayyakinmu sun haɗa da dukkan tsarin daga bincike da haɓakawa, kera, talla har zuwa tallafin fasaha. Kamfaninmu yana cikin Garin Yuanhua, Birnin Haining, Jihar Zhejiang. Muna da ƙwararrun masana fasaha na matakin farko, haɗaɗɗiyar cibiyar gwaji, da babban cibiyar kera kayayyaki. Mu amintattun masu samar da tace ruwan halal ne, muna biyan buƙatu na musamman na masu amfani da Musulmi a Malaysia, Indonesia, da sauran ƙasashen Musulmi.
ui.about_feat_1: An kafa shi a 1998 – Sama da shekaru ashirin na ƙwarewar kera kaya
ui.about_feat_2: Cikakken tsarin haɗin gwiwa: R&D, Kera kaya, QC, jigilar kaya
ui.about_feat_3: Layin kera kayayyaki masu takardar shaidar NSF, ISO, CE, da Halal
ui.about_feat_4: Aikin OEM/ODM ga manyan kamfanoni a ƙasashe 50+
ui.about_feat_5: Yana cikin Haining, Zhejiang – Cibiyar tace ruwa ta kasar Sin
ui.why_eyebrow: Me ya sa Za Ku Zaɓe Mu
ui.why_desc: Daga albarkatun ƙasa zuwa binciken ƙarshe, kowane samfuri yana wucewa ta tsarinmu mai tsauri na kula da inganci.
ui.why_card1_desc: Takaddun shaidar NSF / ISO / CE / Halal waɗanda ke tabbatar da kowane rukunin kaya da muke kerawa.
ui.why_card2_desc: Alamar kasuwanci ta musamman, marufi, da ƙayyadaddun samfura don dacewa da kasuwar ku.
ui.why_card3_desc: Layin kera kaya guda 4 da suka haɗa da PP, Carbon, Quick-connect, da Gwajin Yoyo.
ui.why_card4_desc: Lokacin isarwa kwanaki 7–15 tare da kafaffen tsarin jigilar kaya zuwa ƙasashe 50+.
ui.products_desc: Samfura 42 a rukunai 8 – daga katirijin inline zuwa na'urorin ba da ruwa na tsaye da cikakkun tsarin RO.
ui.workshop_desc: Layin kera kaya guda 4: tace PP, katuwar Carbon, Quick-connect inline, da na'urar gano yoyo ta atomatik.
ui.exhibition_desc: Haɗu da ƙungiyarmu a AquaTech Shanghai da sauran manyan abubuwan masana'antu.
ui.contact_desc: Faɗa mana game da aikin ku. Injiniyoyinmu na tallace-tallace suna amsawa cikin sa'o'i 24.
ui.contact_address: 1# Chuangxin Road, Yuanhua Town, Haining, Lardin Zhejiang, Kasar Sin
ui.form_sub: Sami cikakken bayani game da farashi don ƙayyadaddun bayanan ku.
ui.footer_brand_desc: Amintaccen mai kera hanyoyin tace ruwa tun daga 1998. PP, Carbon Block, GAC, T33, RO membranes, da na'urorin ba da ruwa don abokan hulɗar OEM/ODM na duniya.

products.name: Na'urar Ba da Ruwa Mai Launin Zinariya MT-900G
products.desc: Na'urar ba da ruwa ta jikin bango mai matakai 5 na girman ruwa (150ml–850ml) da matakai 5 na zafin ruwa (25°C–100°C). 316L titanium zinariya bakin karfe mai dumama. Kulle don tsaron yara. Kyakkyawan panel na gilashin zinariya.

products.name: Na'urar Ba da Ruwa Mai Launin Fari MT-S800
products.desc: Na'urar ba da ruwa ta jikin bango mai ƙarfin 2200W. Fitowar ruwan zafi cikin sauri na sakan 3. Daidaitawar girman ruwa da zafi matakai 5. Panel na gilashin fari.

products.name: Na'urar Ba da Ruwa Mai Kore Mai Duhu MT-600DG
products.desc: Na'urar ba da ruwa ta jikin bango mai kyakkyawan fasalin zamani a cikin launi na musamman na kore mai duhu. Tana adana fili kuma tana ba da ruwa mai tsafta akai-akai.

products.name: Na'urar Ba da Ruwa Mai Launin Baƙi MT-B600
products.desc: Na'urar ba da ruwa ta jikin bango mai ƙarfin 2200W da dumama cikin sakan 3. Cikakken panel na gilashi tare da sassan filastik masu santsi.

products.name: Na'urar Ba da Ruwa ta Bango MT-E600
products.desc: Na'urar ba da ruwa ta jikin bango mai launin baƙi da fari. Mai ƙanƙanta, mai adana wuta, tare da fitowar ruwa matakai daban-daban.

products.name: Na'urar Ba da Ruwa ta Tsaye 1000W MT-DV-E600
products.desc: Babban na'urar ba da ruwa ta tsaye tare da tankin bakin karfe 304 da ƙarfin dumama 1KW. Fuskar dijital ta LED.

products.name: Na'urar Ba da Ruwa ta Tsaye MT-V-E300A
products.desc: Na'urar ba da ruwa ta tsaye mai tankin bakin karfe 304 da zaɓuɓɓukan fitowar ruwa da yawa. Fasalin Baƙi/Fari.

products.name: Tace Ruwa na Reverse Osmosis na Ƙarƙashin Sinki
products.desc: Tsarin RO wanda ke dogaro da matsin lamba na ruwa don tura ruwa ta membrane RO. Matakai daban-daban: tace yashi, tace carbon, membrane RO.

products.name: Tace Ruwa na Big Blue Inchi 30 Mataki Uku
products.desc: Tace ruwa mataki uku: tace PP (manyan ƙazanta), membrane RO (karafa, ƙwayoyin cuta, bididi), CTO Carbon Block (klorin, ɗanɗano).

products.name: Na'urar Tsabtace Ruwa Mataki Uku da UV
products.desc: Tsarin tsabtace ruwa mataki uku da aka haɓaka tare da UV don tabbatar da tsaron ruwa.

products.name: Tace Ruwa Matsakaici tare da Maƙalar Jan Ƙarfe
products.desc: Katirijin tace ruwa matsakaici mai maƙalar jan ƙarfe don ingantaccen aiki.

products.name: Gidan Tace Ruwa na Eco Express
products.desc: Tace carbon block ta amfani da carbon da aka matse. Tana cire klorini, pesticides, da wari.

products.name: Tace Carbon Block (Kwandon Kwakwa)
products.desc: Carbon ɗin kwandon kwakwa mai inganci (1000 iodine) don tsaftacewa. Tsawon inchi 10, faɗin inchi 2.5.

products.name: Tace Ruwa na PP Spun
products.desc: Microfibers na polypropyline 100% zalla. Tana cire tsatsa, yashi, da datti. Akwai girman inchi 10/20/30/40.

products.name: Tace Carbon na UDF Granular
products.desc: Tace GAC ta inchi 10 mai inganci. Tana rage klorini, sinadarai, da wari.

products.name: Katirijin Tace Ruwa na Ceramic
products.desc: Katirijin tace ruwa na ceramic mai inganci don cire ƙananan ƙazanta da ƙwayoyin cuta.

products.name: Tace Ruwa na Ion-Exchange Resin
products.desc: Katirijin resin don laushin ruwa da cire karafa.

products.name: Katirijin Ultrafiltration (UF)
products.desc: Katirijin hollow-fiber don cire ƙwayoyin cuta, bididi, da sauran ƙazanta.

products.name: Tace Inline na Dutsen Maifan
products.desc: Tace inline mai ɗauke da duwatsun Maifan don sanya sinadarai a ruwa da inganta ɗanɗano.

products.name: Tace Inline na Sinadarai
products.desc: Tana sanya muhimman sinadarai a cikin tsaftataccen ruwa don lafiya da ɗanɗano.

products.name: Katirijin Tace Membrane na RO
products.desc: Katirijin membrane na reverse osmosis — babban sashin tsarin RO don tsaftace ruwa.

products.name: Haɗaɗɗen Katirijin Tace Ruwa
products.desc: Haɗin katirijin tace ruwa daban-daban don tsaftacewa mataki-mataki.

products.name: Tace Inline Carbon na Post T33
products.desc: Tace inline carbon don matakin ƙarshe na inganta ɗanɗano da cire wari.

products.name: Katirijin Inline na PP
products.desc: Tace inline na polypropyline don ƙananan tsarin tsabtace ruwa.

products.name: Katirijin Fiber na Polypropyline na PPF
products.desc: Katirijin fiber na polypropyline don cire datti.

products.name: Katirijin Carbon na Pre-UDF
products.desc: Katirijin carbon don kare membrane na gaba.

products.name: Katirijin Tace na T33 Post
products.desc: Tace carbon mai inganci don matakin ƙarshe na tsabtace ruwa.

products.name: Katirijin Tace Ruwa na Ultra Film
products.desc: Katirijin ultrafiltration mai fasahar zamani don ingantaccen tace ruwa.

products.name: Tace Ruwa na UF Hollow Fiber
products.desc: Katirijin ultrafiltration don cire ƙazanta masu nauyi.

products.name: Tace PP na Masana'antu (SOE/DOE)
products.desc: Tace PP ta masana'antu, tana samuwa a nau'in SOE da DOE.

products.name: Tace PP tare da Fin End Cap
products.desc: Katirijin PP na masana'antu mai murfin fin don dacewa da gidan tace ruwa.

products.name: Tace PP tare da Zoben Silicon
products.desc: Katirijin PP mai zoben silicon na abinci don hana yoyo.

products.name: Tace Carbon Block na Masana'antu
products.desc: Tace carbon block ta masana'antu don babban matsin lamba.

products.name: Katuwar Carbon da Aka Matse
products.desc: Katuwar carbon mai kauri don cire klorini da VOCs.

products.name: Ƙaramar Tace Inline ta T33 Mai Sinadari
products.desc: Tana inganta ɗanɗano da wari ta hanyar cire klorini da sanya sinadarai a ruwa.

products.name: Tace Inline Mai Kashe Ƙwayoyin Cututa
products.desc: Fasahar tace ruwa da ke cire ƙwayoyin cuta da bididi tare da sanya sinadarai.

products.name: Katirijin Tace Mai Kashe Cututa
products.desc: Tana cire ƙwayoyin cuta da bididi yadda ya kamata tare da sanya sinadarai.

products.name: Katirijin Inline na Cation Resin
products.desc: Tana sa ruwa ya yi laushi ta hanyar cire karafa kamar calcium da magnesium.

products.name: Tace Inline Carbon na T33 (Kwakwa)
products.desc: Katirijin T33 na matakin ƙarshe mai amfani da carbon ɗin kwakwa.

products.name: Babban Membrane na RO na 400GPD
products.desc: Membrane na RO mai ƙarfi don gida da masana'antu.

products.name: Na'urar Sinadari ta Dutsen Maifan
products.desc: Na'urar tsabtace ruwa mai matakai da yawa tare da dutsen Maifan.

products.name: Tsarin Ruwan Alkaline
products.desc: Tana samar da ruwan alkaline ta hanyar haɓaka pH da sanya sinadarai.
